verses.text: At the seventh year's end, release debts. Release. Mercy frees the debtor.
At the seventh year's end, release debts. Release. Mercy frees the debtor.
At the seventh year's end, release debts. Release. Mercy frees the debtor.
There need be no poor if you obey; you shall lend, not borrow. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
There need be no poor if you obey; you shall lend, not borrow. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
There need be no poor if you obey; you shall lend, not borrow. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
Shut not your hand from your poor brother. Open hand. Generosity is commanded.
Shut not your hand from your poor brother. Open hand. Generosity is commanded.
Give freely, not grudging, for the poor never cease. Give. The heart, not just the gift, matters.
Give freely, not grudging, for the poor never cease. Give. The heart, not just the gift, matters.
Give freely, not grudging, for the poor never cease. Give. The heart, not just the gift, matters.
Free the Hebrew servant the seventh year, not empty-handed. Freed. Remember your own bondage.
Free the Hebrew servant the seventh year, not empty-handed. Freed. Remember your own bondage.
Free the Hebrew servant the seventh year, not empty-handed. Freed. Remember your own bondage.
Free the Hebrew servant the seventh year, not empty-handed. Freed. Remember your own bondage.
If he loves you and will stay, bore his ear. Willing. Love may bind by choice.
If he loves you and will stay, bore his ear. Willing. Love may bind by choice.
Grudge not his freedom; he served you well. Fair. Treat servants justly.
Sanctify the firstborn males to the LORD. Firstborn. The best is God's.
Sanctify the firstborn males to the LORD. Firstborn. The best is God's.
Sanctify the firstborn males to the LORD. Firstborn. The best is God's.
Eat the blemished at home, but pour out the blood. At home. The flawed is not offered.
Eat the blemished at home, but pour out the blood. At home. The flawed is not offered.
